channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: “I’ve been haunted by what happened for decades—by [my teach…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
“I’ve been haunted by what happened for decades—by [my teacher’s] death, yes, but also what a dramatic end does to a person. How it becomes entertainment,” @brennaehrlich.bsky.social writes.

Her exploration of Leslie Buck and how a murder becomes true crime: apple.news/At4X8fv9wQAGcCsz7GDauPQ
item.content:encoded:
“I’ve been haunted by what happened for decades—by [my teacher’s] death, yes, but also what a dramatic end does to a person. How it becomes entertainment,” @brennaehrlich.bsky.social writes.

Her exploration of Leslie Buck and how a murder becomes true crime: apple.news/At4X8fv9wQAGcCsz7GDauPQ

item.title: Russell Kirby, a friend of Leslie Buck’s husband, kidnapped …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Russell Kirby, a friend of Leslie Buck’s husband, kidnapped her in 2002. He hit her, tackled her, bound her, and forced her into her own car.

She escaped and came home. The next day, Leslie was dead.

Read Rolling Stone’s investigation into her death: apple.news/At4X8fv9wQAG...
item.content:encoded:
Russell Kirby, a friend of Leslie Buck’s husband, kidnapped her in 2002. He hit her, tackled her, bound her, and forced her into her own car.

She escaped and came home. The next day, Leslie was dead.

Read Rolling Stone’s investigation into her death: apple.news/At4X8fv9wQAG...

item.title: Rolling Stone Reports, only on Apple News: Was My Teacher Mu…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Rolling Stone Reports, only on Apple News: Was My Teacher Murdered?

In 2002, Leslie Buck died under mysterious circumstances in Mystic, Connecticut. Two decades later, @brennaehrlich.bsky.social went back to find out who she was — and what really happened.

Read: apple.news/At4X8fv9wQAG...
item.content:encoded:
Rolling Stone Reports, only on Apple News: Was My Teacher Murdered?

In 2002, Leslie Buck died under mysterious circumstances in Mystic, Connecticut. Two decades later, @brennaehrlich.bsky.social went back to find out who she was — and what really happened.

Read: apple.news/At4X8fv9wQAG...

item.title: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy fired Gen. Oleksandr Syrskyi a…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy fired Gen. Oleksandr Syrskyi as commander-in-chief of Ukraine's armed forces following days of protests demanding his removal. Zelenskyy appointed Mykhailo Drapatyi as the new army chief. n.pr/4gQvhU9
item.content:encoded: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy fired Gen. Oleksandr Syrskyi as commander-in-chief of Ukraine's armed forces following days of protests demanding his removal. Zelenskyy appointed Mykhailo Drapatyi as the new army chief. n.pr/4gQvhU9

item.title: Self Defense Family will also play some rare live shows over…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Self Defense Family will also play some rare live shows over the next month — a pair with their peers in Fiddlehead and one in Chicago with reunited Philadelphia heroes Ink & Dagger.

stereogum.com/2505846/self...
item.content:encoded:
Self Defense Family will also play some rare live shows over the next month — a pair with their peers in Fiddlehead and one in Chicago with reunited Philadelphia heroes Ink & Dagger.

stereogum.com/2505846/self...

item.title: Today, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told senators that ins…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Today, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told senators that instead of criticism, we should be praising Trump for dragging us into war.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Today, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told senators that instead of criticism, we should be praising Trump for dragging us into war.

item.title: @zohrankmamdani.bsky.social talks about dealing with death t…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social talks about dealing with death threats:

“It is hard to prepare for death threats. It is hard to prepare for getting a phone call from a district attorney telling you that someone from another state is going to be charged for what they have said & hoped to do about you.”
item.content:encoded:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social talks about dealing with death threats:

“It is hard to prepare for death threats. It is hard to prepare for getting a phone call from a district attorney telling you that someone from another state is going to be charged for what they have said & hoped to do about you.”

item.title: ━━ イベントレポ（写真12枚）━━ 🚨相葉雅紀が“大追跡”したのは 「嵐の歌と振付」 🚨髙木雄也 …

item.title: @zohrankmamdani.bsky.social on the Israel-Palestine conflict…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social on the Israel-Palestine conflict:

“When I’m speaking about the importance of dignity and international law and human rights, I speak about that with an application to everyone. For a long time, what we’ve seen is a willingness to exempt Palestinians from those ideals.”
item.content:encoded:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social on the Israel-Palestine conflict:

“When I’m speaking about the importance of dignity and international law and human rights, I speak about that with an application to everyone. For a long time, what we’ve seen is a willingness to exempt Palestinians from those ideals.”

item.title: The announcement effectively canceled Nicaragua's next elect…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The announcement effectively canceled Nicaragua's next elections, originally scheduled for November 2027. n.pr/4frhYXM
item.content:encoded: The announcement effectively canceled Nicaragua's next elections, originally scheduled for November 2027. n.pr/4frhYXM

item.title: Rolling Stone obtained CDC meeting notes highlighting how Ja…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description: Rolling Stone obtained CDC meeting notes highlighting how Jay Bhattacharya created a crisis at the agency by having Americans detained in response to the Ebola outbreak. One CDC employee called it a “wild misuse” of power. www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded: Rolling Stone obtained CDC meeting notes highlighting how Jay Bhattacharya created a crisis at the agency by having Americans detained in response to the Ebola outbreak. One CDC employee called it a “wild misuse” of power. www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: Vermont Public’s review of more than 130 hours of body camer…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Vermont Public’s review of more than 130 hours of body camera footage shows local police confronted both ICE and protesters as officers resisted — but ultimately accepted — a role in March’s immigration raid (via Vermont Public).
item.content:encoded: Vermont Public’s review of more than 130 hours of body camera footage shows local police confronted both ICE and protesters as officers resisted — but ultimately accepted — a role in March’s immigration raid (via Vermont Public).

item.title: Mamdani talks to Rolling Stone about his primary sweep, Trum…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Mamdani talks to Rolling Stone about his primary sweep, Trump, Taylor Swift's wedding, death threats, and the Democratic Party's future.

“What we’re showing in NYC is that it is possible to put working people back at the heart of our politics.”

Interview ↓ www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Mamdani talks to Rolling Stone about his primary sweep, Trump, Taylor Swift's wedding, death threats, and the Democratic Party's future.

“What we’re showing in NYC is that it is possible to put working people back at the heart of our politics.”

Interview ↓ www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: International students could once stay as long as they neede…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: International students could once stay as long as they needed to complete their college degrees, but that's changing, and the restrictions could cut into college budgets. n.pr/4fu5bny
item.content:encoded: International students could once stay as long as they needed to complete their college degrees, but that's changing, and the restrictions could cut into college budgets. n.pr/4fu5bny

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: @zohrankmamdani.bsky.social speaks about his political convi…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social speaks about his political convictions:

“The more you’re in politics, the more you’re told this is just simply how it is. And to me, I just never think that’s a good enough answer.”
item.content:encoded:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social speaks about his political convictions:

“The more you’re in politics, the more you’re told this is just simply how it is. And to me, I just never think that’s a good enough answer.”

item.title: A new study finds that consumers who are paying a premium fo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A new study finds that consumers who are paying a premium for foods advertised as made with avocado oil are probably not getting what they think they're buying. n.pr/4fKymnI
item.content:encoded: A new study finds that consumers who are paying a premium for foods advertised as made with avocado oil are probably not getting what they think they're buying. n.pr/4fKymnI

@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social speaks about his political convictions:

“The more you’re in politics, the more you’re told this is just simply how it is. And to me, I just never think that’s a good enough answer.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social speaks about his political convictions:

“The more you’re in politics, the more you’re told this is just simply how it is. And to me, I just never think that’s a good enough answer.”

item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Baritone sax master Colin Stetson and experimental bagpiper Brìghde Chaimbeul announced a new collaborative album.

Its lead single sounds like rave music from an alien planet.
item.content:encoded:
Baritone sax master Colin Stetson and experimental bagpiper Brìghde Chaimbeul announced a new collaborative album.

Its lead single sounds like rave music from an alien planet.

item.title: @zohrankmamdani.bsky.social on criticism of his views and hi…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social on criticism of his views and his wife Rama Duwaji's on Gaza:

"It is hard to prepare for death threats… When you are willing to speak up for all people, there are consequences that come from it."

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social on criticism of his views and his wife Rama Duwaji's on Gaza:

"It is hard to prepare for death threats… When you are willing to speak up for all people, there are consequences that come from it."

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: The movement, which began as a satirical protest, has evolve…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The movement, which began as a satirical protest, has evolved into a nationwide challenge to Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government. n.pr/3R6h8rH
item.content:encoded: The movement, which began as a satirical protest, has evolved into a nationwide challenge to Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government. n.pr/3R6h8rH

item.title: Only on Apple News: Rolling Stone presents Special Issue 002…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Only on Apple News: Rolling Stone presents Special Issue 002 with 5 true crime stories, including a deep dive into a teacher’s mysterious murder.

+ ‘A Hawaii Politican Breaks Bad’
+ 'The Rise and Fall of the QAnon Queen of Canada’
+ More

Read: apple.news/IDH7ewqgVRpS...
item.content:encoded:
Only on Apple News: Rolling Stone presents Special Issue 002 with 5 true crime stories, including a deep dive into a teacher’s mysterious murder.

+ ‘A Hawaii Politican Breaks Bad’
+ 'The Rise and Fall of the QAnon Queen of Canada’
+ More

Read: apple.news/IDH7ewqgVRpS...

item.description:

https://natalie.mu/music/news/681839?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#デビアン
item.content:encoded:
Devil ANTHEM.「UP」を再レコーディング、ラップの自己紹介パートを一新
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681839?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#デビアン
